Moonrise Kingdom (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $45,512,466Details
International Box Office $23,335,980
Worldwide Box Office $68,848,446
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,135,093
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,662,363
Total $15,797,456
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set on an island off the coast of New England in the summer of 1965, the story of two twelve-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities try to hunt them down, a violent storm is brewing off-shore—and the peaceful island community is turned upside down in more ways than anyone can handle.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$522,996 (1.1% of total gross)
Legs:9.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/924 max. theaters, 8.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $68,383,046

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 25th, 2012 (Limited) by Focus Features
June 29th, 2012 (Expands Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 16th, 2012 (Wide) (France)
May 24th, 2012 (Wide) (Germany)
May 24th, 2012 (Wide) (Austria)
May 25th, 2012 (Wide) (Turkey)
Video Release: October 16th, 2012 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content and smoking.

Running Time: 94 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Sequences, Breaking the Fourth Wall, Character's Journey Shown on Map, Ensemble, Intertitle, Prologue, Split Screen, Voiceover/Narration

Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Set on an island off the coast of New England in the summer of 1965, the story of two twelve-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities try to hunt them down, a violent storm is brewing off-shore—and the peaceful island community is turned upside down in more ways than anyone can handle.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$522,996 (1.1% of total gross)
Legs:9.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:66.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/924 max. theaters, 8.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $68,383,046
